description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of dark gray and white exterior walls, accented by wooden paneling. The structure features large, rectangular windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, creating a private and inviting outdoor space. There is a spacious driveway leading to a garage, as well as a patio area with outdoor seating. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, enhancing its open and airy feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious blend of materials.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, wood accents, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a garage, patios, balconies, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a prominent balcony above the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area, extensive wood paneling, and the landscaped backyard with trees.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with a clear look at the main door, garage, and symmetrical landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional terrace space, and more private garden areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, small steps, a covered porch, and is flanked by large windows and landscaping.
